pendingImprovements.title: 프론트엔드 표시 상태와 AI 분석 상태 동일 슬롯 참조 검증
pendingImprovements.note: After commit a4c37c8 and deployment dpl_57ta8t6AHtXrhZPWXWdzM7np8SQs reached READY, the false '서버 실시간 데이터 분석' badge was removed for a fresh query, but cache-redis-dc1-01 still answered 85% while the dashboard card showed MEM 93% at slot 101/143. The detail panel now honestly reports 일반 대화 응답, confirming the remaining blocker is upstream AI/data parity rather than frontend badge promotion.

notes: Verified the latest Vercel production deployment dpl_57ta8t6AHtXrhZPWXWdzM7np8SQs for commit a4c37c8 reached READY and was promoted to openmanager-ai.vercel.app.
Verified /dashboard rendered 'Synthetic OTel snapshot · 16:50 KST (slot 101/143)' and the cache-redis-dc1-01 server card showed MEM 93.0%.
Verified a fresh AI sidebar query 'cache-redis-dc1-01 메모리 사용률 몇 %야?' returned a successful streaming answer on production.
Verified the assistant response badge is now 'Streaming AI · 일반 대화 응답', so the false realtime-analysis promotion was removed.
Observed that the fresh AI answer still returned 85% instead of the dashboard raw MEM 93%, and the detail panel now honestly shows only 일반 대화 응답 / Streaming AI without any parity contract block.
